mapper.select: select sc.id, sc.control_no as controlNo, sc.channel_code as channelCode, sc.contract_id as contractId, sc.scenario_type as scenarioType, sc.scenario_code as scenarioCode, sc.bill_difference_type as billDifferenceType, sc.difference_amount as differenceAmount, sc.callback_delay_minutes as callbackDelayMinutes, sc.effective_count as effectiveCount, sc.consumed_count as consumedCount, sc.status, sc.consumed_at as consumedAt, sc.remark, sc.tenant_id as tenantId, sc.created_by as createdBy, sc.created_at as createdAt, sc.updated_by as updatedBy, sc.updated_at as updatedAt, sc.del_flag as delFlag from payment_mango_pay_scenario_control sc where sc.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and sc.channel_code = #{channelCode} and sc.scenario_type = #{scenarioType} and sc.status = 'ACTIVE' and sc.consumed_count < sc.effective_count and sc.del_flag = 0 and ( sc.contract_id is null or sc.contract_id = #{contractId} ) and ( #{contractId} is null or exists ( select 1 from payment_channel_contract cc join payment_channel c on c.id = cc.channel_id and c.tenant_id = cc.tenant_id and c.channel_code = #{channelCode} and c.status = 1 and c.del_flag = 0 where cc.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and cc.id = #{contractId} and cc.status = 1 and cc.del_flag = 0 ) ) order by case when sc.contract_id = #{contractId} then 0 else 1 end, sc.created_at asc, sc.id asc limit 1
mapper.update: update payment_mango_pay_scenario_control set consumed_count = consumed_count + 1, consumed_at = now(), status = case when consumed_count + 1 >= effective_count then 'CONSUMED' else 'ACTIVE' end, updated_by = #{operatorId}, updated_at = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and status = 'ACTIVE' and consumed_count < effective_count and del_flag = 0
